SomniSense AURA

Everything,
in one system.

From adaptive spinal alignment to passive AI sensing — every night moves you towards a healthier tomorrow.

🛏️
Adaptive Spinal Alignment
Smart-firmness adjustments maintain ideal spine curvature throughout the night.
🔬
Passive AI Sensor Array
No wearables required. The mattress passively collects heart rate, breathing, and movement data.
📲
App-Connected Intelligence
Every insight flows directly to the SomniSense app — live data, morning reports, health trends.
🧩
Scalable Modular System
Choose your size and add AI features progressively. Your SomniSense grows with you.

Your sleep,
in your hands.

Live monitoring. Morning insights. Personalised health plans. Everything synced from your mattress to your phone.

Market Proof

Validated by
real users.

101 respondents. Real data. Clear demand for smarter sleep.

82%
willing to pay extra for health monitoring
88%
rated sleep as average or below
55%
sleep under the recommended 7–8 hours daily
😴
Sleep deprivation is endemic
Over half of respondents sleep less than the recommended duration. SomniSense addresses a genuine, daily health problem.
💰
Willingness to invest is high
82% are open to paying more for health monitoring. The feature-tier pricing model maps directly onto expressed consumer intent.
🚀
First-mover advantage
Nearly 70% have little or no awareness of AI mattress technology — an untapped market waiting to be shaped.
Market signal

Users have the problem.
Users want the solution.

SomniSense sits at the intersection of sleep improvement, posture correction, and health monitoring — exactly where our research shows clear consumer demand already exists.

SomniSense App

Every night,
a healthier tomorrow.

The SomniSense app gives you a real-time window into your sleep quality, health trends, and personalised recovery insights — synced live from your mattress.

📊
Live Sleep Monitoring
Real-time heart rate, breathing and sleep stage tracking — displayed as you sleep.
🧠
Granular Sleep Analysis
92-point sleep score breaking down deep sleep quality, recovery velocity and consistency.
🎯
Personalised Health Plan
AI-driven recommendations — temperature, white noise, wake-up timing — tailored to you.
🌅
Morning Insight Report
Wake to a summary: sleep duration, recovery score, and your next-day optimisation goal.
🎙️
Voice Mode Control
Say "I'm going to sleep" — the app and mattress respond instantly to your preferences.
🌙  Download SomniSense App
Intelligence

Everything your sleep
needs to know.

Six pillars of intelligence — working together every night.

📡
Passive AI Sensor Array
No wearables. The mattress passively collects heart rate, breathing and movement data — the app visualises it in real time.
💤
Sleep Stage Detection
Tracks REM, light and deep sleep cycles throughout the night, with a full breakdown every morning.
⏰
Smart Wake-Up
Wakes you at the lightest sleep stage within your window — so you always feel refreshed.
📈
Long-Term Trends
Weekly and monthly health trends — heart rate variability, sleep consistency, recovery velocity — over time.
🎙️
Voice Control
Speak to your mattress. It learns your preferences and adjusts before you even lie down.
🧩
Modular Config
Toggle AI features, adjust firmness zones, and manage your sleep system — all from the app.
